title: Mandelson, a Friend of Epstein’s, Became U.S. Ambassador Despite Failing Security Vetting
summary_full: Britain’s foreign office overruled vetting officials in granting Peter Mandelson, a friend of Jeffrey Epstein, the highest level of security clearance, the government said.
summary_public: Britain’s foreign office overruled vetting officials in granting Peter Mandelson, a friend of Jeffrey Epstein, the highest level of security clearance, the government said.
